mapper.select: /* on.standard.system.menu.selectMenuByUrl */ SELECT SMMH.MENU_DIV_CD , SMMH.MENU_SERNO , SMMH.MENU_CD , SMMH.UPR_MENU_CD , SMMH.KOR_NM , SMMH.MENU_PARAM , SMMH.LAY_OUT , SMMH.RTN_URL , SMMH.URL_ADDR , SMMH.SORT_NO , SMMH.USE_YN , SMMH.LEVEL , SMMH.SORT_PATH , SMMH.MENU_PATH , SMMH.MENU_CD_PATH FROM SVI_MENU_MNG_HIERARCHY SMMH WHERE SMMH.URL_ADDR = #{pageUrl}

/* on.standard.system.menu.selectMenuPermissionCheck */ SELECT MM.MENU_DIV_CD , MM.MENU_CD , MM.URL_ADDR , MM.MENU_PARAM , MM.KOR_NM , AUM.USER_ID , MM.MENU_PATH , MM.MENU_CD_PATH , MAX(MAM.READ_YN) READ_YN , MAX(MAM.WRITE_YN) WRITE_YN , MAX(MAM.UPDATE_YN) UPDATE_YN , MAX(MAM.DELETE_YN) DELETE_YN , MAX(MAM.POPUP_OPEN_YN) POPUP_OPEN_YN , MAX(MAM.POPUP_READ_YN) POPUP_READ_YN , MAX(MAM.POPUP_WRITE_YN) POPUP_WRITE_YN , MAX(MAM.POPUP_UPDATE_YN) POPUP_UPDATE_YN , MAX(MAM.POPUP_DELETE_YN) POPUP_DELETE_YN FROM SVI_MENU_MNG_HIERARCHY MM INNER JOIN STB_M_MENU_AUTH_MNG MAM on MM.MENU_CD = MAM.MENU_CD INNER JOIN STB_M_AUTH_USER_MNG AUM on MAM.AUTH_ID = AUM.AUTH_ID WHERE MM.URL_ADDR = #{urlAddr} AND AUM.USER_ID = #{userId} GROUP BY MM.MENU_DIV_CD, MM.MENU_CD, MM.URL_ADDR, MM.MENU_PARAM, MM.KOR_NM, AUM.USER_ID, MM.MENU_PATH, MM.MENU_CD_PATH

/* on.standard.system.menu.selectLeftMenus */ SELECT DISTINCT SMMH.LEVEL , SMMH.MENU_CD , SMMH.UPR_MENU_CD , SMMH.KOR_NM , SMMH.PAGE_CL , SMMH.URL_ADDR , SMMH.MENU_PARAM , SMMH.MENU_CSS , SMMH.MENU_TARGET , SMMH.MENU_PATH , SMMH.IS_LEAF , CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM SVI_MENU_MNG_HIERARCHY X WHERE X.URL_ADDR = #{pageUrl} AND X.MENU_PATH LIKE CONCAT(SMMH.MENU_PATH, '%') ) THEN 'on' ELSE '' END AS MENU_FOCUS FROM SVI_MENU_MNG_HIERARCHY SMMH INNER JOIN STB_M_MENU_AUTH_MNG MMAM ON SMMH.MENU_CD = MMAM.MENU_CD WHERE MMAM.AUTH_ID IN ( SELECT AUTH_ID FROM STB_M_AUTH_USER_MNG SMAUM WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND USE_YN = 'Y' ) AND SMMH.USE_YN = 'Y' AND SMMH.MENU_DIV_CD = 'MA' AND SMMH.PAGE_CL IN ('MAIN') ORDER BY SMMH.LEVEL, SMMH.SORT_PATH
